notes: Solid overall structure with helmet, CORS, rate limiting, UUID-based filenames, and comprehensive error handler. Deductions: (security) no file magic byte validation — MIME is client-supplied so a malicious file with spoofed Content-Type+valid extension bypasses the filter; no auth on DELETE endpoint; (error_handling) thumbnail generation failure leaves orphaned upload on disk with no cleanup; sendFile routes don't verify file still exists on disk; (best_practices) response DTO mapping repeated 3 times instead of extracted helper; uses sync fs in delete handler; (robustness) no graceful shutdown, no request timeout, no disk space check, in-memory store loses all data on restart, no per-user concurrency control.
